policy: Almost Unified and Polymorph handle duplicate materials first. KubeJS should only add explicit recipes/tags after a real JEI conflict, missing progression bridge, or player-facing recipe gap is observed.

material_groups.goal: avoid duplicate ingots/plates/gears cluttering crafting and reward loops
material_groups.runtime_action: active unification first; exact KubeJS recipes only after JEI review

material_groups.goal: make villages, camps, bridges, and interiors share a believable palette
material_groups.runtime_action: active through Every Compat; settlement templates choose palette manually

material_groups.goal: make animal drops, village kitchens, travel supplies, and Survivalist progression connect
material_groups.runtime_action: active mods installed; deeper recipes remain KubeJS-gated

material_groups.goal: turn spell, boss, and dragon materials into tiered craft/progression proof
material_groups.runtime_action: contract active; final bridge needs loot/bounty/quest pass

kubejs_guardrails: Do not rewrite broad recipe families without first checking Almost Unified output.
Do not hide items until Item Obliterator or a KubeJS removal pass has a documented replacement path.
Prefer tags for category logic and exact item IDs for capstone rewards.
